name: Main → Staging → Prod

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]

permissions:
  id-token: write        # OIDC federation to Azure — no stored cloud secrets
  contents: read
  packages: write

concurrency:
  group: deploy-main
  cancel-in-progress: false   # deployments never cancel mid-flight

jobs:
  verify:
    name: Full verification (PR suite)
    uses: ./.github/workflows/pr.yml   # reusable — main re-runs exactly what PRs ran

  publish:
    name: Sign & push images
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: verify
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: azure/login@v2
        with: { client-id: "${{ vars.AZURE_CLIENT_ID_CI }}", tenant-id: "${{ vars.AZURE_TENANT_ID }}", subscription-id: "${{ vars.AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID }}" }
      - run: just build-images tag=${{ github.sha }}
      - run: just push-images tag=${{ github.sha }}      # ACR
      - name: Cosign sign
        run: just sign-images tag=${{ github.sha }}

  staging:
    name: Deploy staging
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: publish
    environment: staging
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: azure/login@v2
        with: { client-id: "${{ vars.AZURE_CLIENT_ID_STAGING }}", tenant-id: "${{ vars.AZURE_TENANT_ID }}", subscription-id: "${{ vars.AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID }}" }
      - run: just tf-apply env=staging                   # plan output archived as artifact
      - run: just migrate-remote env=staging             # gated job: pre-flight linter + advisory lock
      - run: just deploy env=staging tag=${{ github.sha }}
      - run: just smoke env=staging                      # health + contract smoke
      - run: just e2e env=staging                        # golden journeys J1–J8 (stub-LLM)
      - run: just evals-full env=staging                 # live-model eval suite; trend-gated
      - name: Annotate release
        run: just release-annotate env=staging tag=${{ github.sha }}   # BOM: images, migrations, packs, prompts, model stages

  prod:
    name: Deploy prod
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: staging
    environment: prod          # protection rule: required reviewer approval
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: azure/login@v2
        with: { client-id: "${{ vars.AZURE_CLIENT_ID_PROD }}", tenant-id: "${{ vars.AZURE_TENANT_ID }}", subscription-id: "${{ vars.AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID }}" }
      - run: just verify-signatures tag=${{ github.sha }}   # cosign verify before anything touches prod
      - run: just tf-plan env=prod                          # non-empty plan pauses for explicit re-approval
      - run: just migrate-remote env=prod
      - run: just deploy env=prod tag=${{ github.sha }}     # new revision 0% → health → 100%
      - run: just smoke env=prod
      - run: just release-annotate env=prod tag=${{ github.sha }}
